seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mermaid Waters and Merrimac. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mermaid Waters vs Merrimac: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mermaid Waters and Merrimac.
heading: Mermaid Waters vs Merrimac — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mermaid Waters, Queensland and Merrimac, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mermaid Waters has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Merrimac (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mermaid Waters or Merrimac safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mermaid Waters has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Merrimac scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mermaid Waters scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Merrimac scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mermaid Waters or Merrimac?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mermaid Waters has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
